title: Fix client folder access to show details, interventions, and photos

requirements.text: Fix the client folder navigation so that clicking on a client folder properly displays the client details page with coordinates, interventions, and photos

quotes: Quand je clique sur un dossier client je nest pas acces au dossier(coordonnéintetvention photo..

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking on a client folder navigates to the client dossier page
Client coordinates are visible on the dossier page
Client interventions list is displayed and accessible
Client photos and media are visible in the interventions section

requirements.text: Verify that the routing from the clients list page to the ClientDossierPage is working correctly with proper client ID parameter passing
acceptanceCriteria: Client ID is correctly passed through the route parameters
ClientDossierPage receives and uses the client ID to fetch data
No console errors related to routing or parameter extraction

requirements.text: Ensure the ClientDossierPage properly displays all client information sections including contact details, interventions list with photos, and blacklist panel
acceptanceCriteria: Client name, address, city, state, zip code are displayed
Phone and email are shown if available
InterventionList component renders and displays all interventions
Media/photos attached to interventions are visible

constraints: Do not modify backend data structures or API endpoints
Maintain existing authentication and authorization logic
Preserve offline functionality and sync capabilities
nonGoals: Adding new features to the client dossier page
Changing the visual design or layout
Modifying the intervention or photo capture workflows
